REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT KORENE TOM'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH FINAL LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE IN GOOD FAITH (1) FACTS ESTABLISHING THAT CC 47(B) PRIVILEGE DOES NOT BAR PLAINTIFF'S CAUSES OF ACTION, EXCEPT MALICIOUS PROSECUTION; AND (2) FACTS SHOWING THAT THE UNDERLYING ACTION ENDED IN PLAINTIFF'S FAVOR WITHIN THE MEANING OF MALICIOUS PROSECUTION CAUSE OF ACTION. THE COURT HAS PREVIOUSLY INSTRUCTED PLAINTIFF TO DO SO, BUT NO RELEVANT ALLEGATIONS APPEARED IN THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. ALL AMENDMENTS SHALL BE IN BOLD FONT. THE COURT FURTHER REMINDS PLAINTIFF OF THE SHAM PLEADING DOCTRINE. JUDGE: VEDICA PURI; CLERK: KENNETH B. HUNT; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-27-2021 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-24-2021 Continued To Sep-15-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-13-2021 Continued To Jul-14-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-24-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT KORENE TOM'S DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with final leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege in good faith (1) facts establishing that CC 47(b) privilege does not bar Plaintiff's causes of action, except malicious prosecution; and (2) facts showing that the underlying action ended in Plaintiff's favor within the meaning of malicious prosecution cause of action. The Court has previously instructed Plaintiff to do so, but no relevant allegations appeared in the First Amended Complaint. All amendments shall be in bold font. The Court further reminds Plaintiff of the sham pleading doctrine. Judge: Vedica Puri; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-23-2021 Continued To May-24-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT KORENE TOM's DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is continued to May 24, 2021 for the moving party to provide a courtesy copy of reply. Courtesy copy to be delivered no later than May 14, 2021 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-18-2021 Continued To Jun-02-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-18-2021 Continued To Apr-07-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-05-2021 Continued To Mar-03-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-15-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant's Demurrerr is SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege in good faith (1) facts establishing that CC 47(b) privilege does not bar Plaintiff's causes of action, except malicious prosecution; and (2) facts showing that the underlying action ended in Plaintiff's favor within the meaning of malicious prosecution cause of action. Order is signed. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: W. Trupek, Not reported =(501/CFH)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-11-2020 Continued To Jan-15-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances by any attorney, any party or any interested party.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT KORENE TOM DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is continued to January 15, 2021 on Court's own motion. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)
